name: Rage
description: Enter a battle rage that grants bonuses to damage, resistance to certain damage types, and other benefits while raging.

name: Reckless Attack
description: When you make your first attack on your turn, you can attack recklessly, gaining advantage on melee weapon attacks using Strength, but attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.

name: Danger Sense
description: You gain an uncanny sense of when things nearby aren't as they should be, granting advantage on certain Dexterity saving throws against effects you can see.

name: Primal Path
description: Choose a Primal Path, which grants additional features as you gain Barbarian levels.

name: Fast Movement
description: Your speed increases while you aren't wearing heavy armor.

name: Feral Instinct
description: Your instincts are so honed that you have advantage on initiative rolls and can act normally in certain situations when surprised.

name: Brutal Critical
description: You can roll additional weapon damage dice when determining the extra damage for a critical hit.

name: Relentless Rage
description: While raging, you can make a Constitution saving throw to avoid being reduced to 0 hit points.

name: Persistent Rage
description: Your rage ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.

name: Indomitable Might
description: If your total for a Strength check is less than your Strength score, you can use your Strength score in place of the total.

name: Primal Champion
description: Your Strength and Constitution scores increase, along with their maximum values.

name: Primal Knowledge
description: You gain proficiency in an additional skill from the Barbarian skill list.

name: Instinctive Pounce
description: When you enter your rage, you can move up to half your speed as part of the same bonus action.
